name: 祖父遺言揭露真相
description: 通過祖父生前錄音揭露父母篡改遺囑、欺騙八位未婚夫的真相。已故長輩的聲音從墳墓中傳來為女主正名，既有情感衝擊又有正義伸張的力量。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: I have a recording of the old master from when he passed away. Real or fake, you'll know at a glance. ... During his lifetime, he asked you to have the eldest Fu daughter.
